prerequisites: A Recruitee account with access to your company workspace.
Permission to open Settings and the Apps and plugins area to generate a personal API token.
Your Recruitee Company ID, which appears in admin API URLs as https://api.recruitee.com/c/{company_id}/...

authMethods.name: Personal API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Authentication uses the api_key secret field as a personal API token sent in an Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Each user generates their own token in Recruitee under Settings > Apps and plugins, and the token does not expire unless it is revoked.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal API token
setupSteps.body: In Recruitee, go to Settings > Apps and plugins and open the Personal API tokens section. Click + New token in the top-right to generate a personal API token, then copy the generated value and store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Find your Company ID
setupSteps.body: Note your Company ID along with the token from the Personal API tokens page. The Company ID also appears as the numeric segment in admin API URLs, for example the 1111 in https://api.recruitee.com/c/1111/admin. The token and Company ID together are required for API access.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the api_key field with the personal API token and set company_id to your Recruitee Company ID. The connector authenticates each request with the Authorization: Bearer <api_key> header and scopes calls to your company using the company_id.
